focus: Operator validation for codex agent-team and native multi-agent telemetry handoff.

checks.name: start_signal_present
checks.description: Verify the run has a start event, status row, or log entry before worker activity begins.

checks.name: role_activity_visible
checks.description: Verify planner, proposer, verifier, or equivalent roles emit distinct progress telemetry during the run.

checks.name: artifact_path_recorded
checks.description: Verify output targets and generated artifact paths are attached to the run context.

checks.name: validation_result_attached
checks.description: Verify the validation command, exit status, and completion timestamp are captured with the run.

checks.name: outcome_handoff_complete
checks.description: Verify the final state is marked as success, retry-needed, or failed with a clear next action.

success_criteria: Each required role transition is traceable from run start to terminal state.
Produced artifacts are identifiable and linked to the same run context.
Validation evidence is present and aligned with the final run outcome.
The handoff clearly states the operator's next action.
